chapter_title.ar: باب الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَ لَمْ يُدْخَلْ بِهَا وَ مَا لَهَا مِنَ الصَّدَاقِ وَ الْعِدَّةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 46 – The woman widowed from her husband and not having been slept with, and what is for her from the dower, and the waiting period

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/204)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/204)
text: الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَ لَمْ يَدْخُلْ بِهَا قَالَ هِيَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ الْمُطَلَّقَةِ الَّتِي لَمْ يَدْخُلْ بِهَا إِنْ كَانَ سَمَّى لَهَا مَهْراً فَلَهَا نِصْفُهُ وَ هِيَ تَرِثُهُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ سَمَّى لَهَا مَهْراً فَلَا مَهْرَ لَهَا وَ هِيَ تَرِثُهُ قُلْتُ وَ الْعِدَّةُ قَالَ كُفَّ عَنْ هَذَا .

en.hubeali: Humeyd, from Ibn Sama’at, from Ahmad Bin Al Hassan, from Muawiya Bin Wahab, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the woman widowed from her husband, and he had not slept with her. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘She is at a status of the divorced woman who had not been slept with, If a dower had been specified for her, so for her is half, and she would inherit him; and if a dower had not been specified for her, so there is no dower for her, and she would inherit him’. I said, ‘And the waiting period?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Refrain from this’.
en.sarwar: 9. Humayd has narrated from ibn Sama‘ah from Ahmad ibn al-Hassan from Mu‘awiyah ibn Wahab from ‘Ubayd ibn Zurarah who has said the following: “About the case of a woman whose husband dies before going to bed with her, abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘She is like a divorced woman with whom he has not gone to bed. If mahr (dower) is set for her she deserves one-half of it, otherwise, she does not have the right to demand mahr (dower) but she has the right to inherit.’ I asked about waiting period. He (the Imam) said, ‘Do not ask about it.’”
